title: lithocardium trachyphyllum
intro: Lithocardium trachyphyllum, also known as the Lithospermum or Gypsywort, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its cardiotonic and anti-inflammatory effects. Lithocardium trachyphyllum has been used to treat various health issues, including cardiovascular problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
